API docs by Redocly

Country Localization

Get multilingual content.

Get multilingual content for the given domain and language.

path Parameters
language
required
string

Language iso code.

domain
required
string
header Parameters
origin
string

Referrer URL.

referer
string

Referrer URL.

Responses

/api/generic/getWebMultilanguages/{domain}/{language}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "error": true,
  • "systemError": true,
  • "responseCodes": [
    • {
      • "responseCode": 1,
      • "responseKey": "SUCCESS",
      • "responseMessage": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "multilanguageId": 0,
      • "typeName": "string",
      • "key": "string",
      • "value": "string",
      • "languageId": 0,
      • "traderId": 0
      }
    ]
}

Validate a user’s location.

Validate a user’s location against geolocation rules and restrictions.

header Parameters
s7oryO9STV
required
string

Session id.

origin
string

Referrer URL.

referer
string

Referrer URL.

finger_print
required
string

Login token fingerprint name.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
traderId
integer <int64>
customerId
integer <int64>
languageId
integer <int64>
device
string
Default: "d"
channel
string
Default: "w"
identity
string
object (AuditHeader)
object (GeolocationValidateRequest)

Responses

/api/geolocation/validate

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "traderId": 0,
  • "customerId": 0,
  • "languageId": 0,
  • "device": "d",
  • "channel": "w",
  • "identity": "string",
  • "auditHeader": {
    • "transactionSeq": 0,
    • "transactionCode": 0,
    • "appName": "string",
    • "traderId": 0,
    • "appUserId": 0,
    • "customerId": 0,
    • "userName": "string",
    • "languageId": "string",
    • "fromIp": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "addOperationLog": true
    },
  • "requestBody": {
    • "geoPacket": {
      • "encryptedContent": "string"
      }
    }
}

application/json

header Parameters
origin
string

Referrer URL.

referer
string

Referrer URL.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
traderId
integer <int64>
customerId
integer <int64>
languageId
integer <int64>
device
string
Default: "d"
channel
string
Default: "w"
identity
string
object (AuditHeader)
object (CouponWrapper)

Responses

/api/generic/mbb/rates

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "traderId": 0,

    • "cps": [

        • "pa": 0,

        • "po": [
          • {
            • "fo": 0,

    • "ad": true,

    • "bo": 0,
    • "sbm": 0,
    • "dev": "string"
    }
}

Get trader notifications.

Get trader notifications for a given domain and language.

path Parameters
language
required
string
Enum: "PTB" "EN" "ES" "DE"

Valid values: 'PTB' - Portuguese, 'EN' - English, 'ES' - Spanish, 'DE' - German,

domain
required
string
header Parameters
origin
string

Referrer URL.

referer
string

Referrer URL.

Responses

/api/generic/traderNotificationList/{domain}/{language}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,

  • "responseCodes": [

    ],

    • {
      • "traderCustNotificationTypeId": 0,
      • "customerNotificationTypeId": 0,
      • "traderId": 0,
      • "webVisible": true,
      • "orderBy": 0,
      • "description": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Get the list of trader modules for a specific domain and device.

Get the list of trader modules for a specific domain and device.

path Parameters
device
required
string
Enum: "m" "d"
domain
required
string
header Parameters
origin
string

Referrer URL.

referer
string

Referrer URL.

Responses

/api/generic/getTraderModules/{domain}/{device}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "error": true,

      • "responseCode": 150,
      • "responseKey": "MAIL_IS_BLOCKED",
      • "responseMessage": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Validate if the username is already registered.

Validate if the username is already registered.

query Parameters
query
required
string

User name.

header Parameters
origin
string

Referrer URL.

referer
string

Referrer URL.

Responses

/api/generic/register/isvalidusername

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "error": true,
  • "systemError": true,
  • "responseCodes": [
    • {
      • "responseCode": 6,
      • "responseKey": "USERNAME_IN_BLACKLIST",
      • "responseMessage": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Get a list of professional statuses available during registration.

Get a list of professional statuses available during registration.

header Parameters
origin
string

Referrer URL.

referer
string

Referrer URL.

Responses

/api/generic/register/professionalStatuses

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "error": true,
  • "systemError": true,
  • "responseCodes": [
    • {
      • "responseCode": 19,
      • "responseKey": "INVALID_TRADER",
      • "responseMessage": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "professionalStatusId": 0,
      • "professionalStatus": "string",
      • "professionalStatusCode": "string",
      • "orderBy": 0
      }
    ]
}

deviceAsUrlParam

encodedbody
required
string

device
required
string

languageid

Get bet type groups

path Parameters
deviceAsUrlParam
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageAsUrlParam
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

traderAsUrlParam
required
string

Trader identifier.

header Parameters
encodedbody
required
string
Value: "e30="

Always set to e30=

device
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageid
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

bragiurl
required
any

URL provided by Sportingtech

customorigin
required
any

Base URL of the client or calling application.

Responses

/api-v2/bet-type-groups/{device}/{language}/{trader}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "sportTypeId": 0,
      • "betTypeGroupMarkets": [
        • {
          • "betTypeGroupMarketId": 0,
          • "betTypeGroupMarketName": "string",

            • {
              • "betTypeGroupId": 0,
              • "betTypeGroupName": "string",
              • "orderBy": 0,
              • "asianOrderBy": 0,
              • "promoted": true,
              • "mainBtgId": 0,
              • "mainBtgName": "string",
              • "mainBtgOrder": 0,
              • "hsd": [
                • {
                  • "id": 0,
                  • "name": "string",
                  • "viewIndex": 0
                  }
                ],
              • "cv": 0,
              • "cvp": "string",
              • "cvOrd": 0,
              • "dt": 0,
              • "ddt": 0
              }
            ]

        ]
      }
    ],
  • "responseCodes": [
    • {
      • "responseCode": 0,
      • "responseKey": "string",
      • "responseMessage": "string",
      • "params": [
        • { }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "success": true
}

Get today's sport types

path Parameters
deviceAsUrlParam
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageAsUrlParam
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

traderAsUrlParam
required
string

Trader identifier.

header Parameters
encodedbody
required
string

Base64-encoded JSON payload containing the request body. The decoded JSON must have the structure: 

{
  "requestBody": {
    "timeRangeInHours": 24,
    "startDate": 1683945600000  // timestamp at 00:00 of current day
  }
}
device
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageid
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

bragiurl
required
any

URL provided by Sportingtech

customorigin
required
any

Base URL of the client or calling application.

Responses

/api-v2/today-sport-types/{device}/{language}/{trader}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "stId": 0,
      • "xid": "string",
      • "stN": "string",
      • "iconId": 0,
      • "pid": 0,
      • "mdt": 0,
      • "lvt": true,
      • "fCnt": 0,
      • "oCnt": 0,
      • "aCnt": 0,
      • "fCM": 0,
      • "oCM": 0,
      • "stSURL": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "responseCodes": [
    • {
      • "responseCode": 0,
      • "responseKey": "string",
      • "responseMessage": "string",
      • "params": [
        • { }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "success": true,
  • "type": "string"
}

Get upcoming events

path Parameters
deviceAsUrlParam
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageAsUrlParam
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

traderAsUrlParam
required
string

Trader identifier.

header Parameters
encodedbody
required
string

Base64-encoded JSON payload containing the request body. The decoded JSON must have the structure: 

{
  "requestBody": {
    "sportSelfUrlKey": "sportSelfUrlKey"
  }
}

Replace "sportSelfUrlKey" with the actual sport "name". SportSelfUrlKey controls which sport is populated with country/season/fixture data in sport list in response. It doesn't affect the data of other sports. If omitted, the first sport in the list (usually soccer) is populated with the data.

device
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageid
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

bragiurl
required
any

URL provided by Sportingtech

customorigin
required
any

Base URL of the client or calling application.

Responses

/api-v2/upcoming-events/{device}/{language}/{trader}

Response samples

Content type

Get promoted events

path Parameters
deviceAsUrlParam
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageAsUrlParam
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

traderAsUrlParam
required
string

Trader identifier.

header Parameters
encodedbody
required
string

Base64-encoded JSON payload containing the request body. The decoded JSON must have the structure: 

{
  "requestBody": {
    "fixtureIds": [/* array of fixture IDs */]
  }
}

Replace fixtureIds with the actual array of fixture identifiers.

device
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageid
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

bragiurl
required
any

customorigin

any

Get detail card data

path Parameters
deviceAsUrlParam
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageAsUrlParam
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

traderAsUrlParam
required
string

Trader identifier.

header Parameters
encodedbody
required
string

Base64-encoded JSON payload containing the request body. The decoded JSON must have the structure: 

{
  "requestBody": {
    "fixtureIds": [/* array of fixture IDs */]
  }
}

Replace fixtureIds with the actual array of fixture identifiers.

device
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageid
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

bragiurl
required
any

URL provided by Sportingtech

customorigin
required
any

Base URL of the client or calling application.

Responses

/api-v2/detail-card/{device}/{language}/{trader}

Get league card data

path Parameters
deviceAsUrlParam
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageAsUrlParam
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

traderAsUrlParam
required
string

Trader identifier.

header Parameters
encodedbody
required
string

Base64-encoded JSON payload containing the request body. The decoded JSON must have the structure: 

{
  "requestBody": {
    "seasonIDs": [/* array of season IDs */]
  }
}

Replace fixtureIds with the actual array of fixture identifiers.

device
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageid
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

bragiurl
required
any

URL provided by Sportingtech

customorigin
required
any

Base URL of the client or calling application.

Responses

/api-v2/league-card/{device}/{language}/{trader}/{seasonIds}/{encodedbody}

Search fixtures

path Parameters
deviceAsUrlParam
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageAsUrlParam
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

traderAsUrlParam
required
string

Trader identifier.

header Parameters
encodedbody
required
string

Base64-encoded JSON payload containing the request body. The decoded JSON must have the structure: 

  "requestBody": {
    "timeRangeInHours": null,
    "fixtureOddIds": [/* array of fixture odd IDs */]
  }
} ```
- `timeRangeInHours`: Optional, may be `null` or a numeric value specifying the time range in hours.   - `fixtureOddIds`: Required, an array of fixture odd identifiers.
device
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageid
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

bragiurl
required
any

URL provided by Sportingtech

customorigin
required
any

Base URL of the client or calling application.

Responses

/api-v2/fixture-search/{device}/{language}/{trader}

Cms

Get left menu

path Parameters
deviceAsUrlParam
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageAsUrlParam
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

traderAsUrlParam
required
string

Trader identifier.

header Parameters
encodedbody
required
string

Base64-encoded JSON payload containing the request body. The decoded JSON must have the structure: 

{
  "requestBody": {
    "timeRangeInHours": <one of 0, 1, 2, 4, 6, 8, 12, 14, 48>
  }
}
device
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageid
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

bragiurl
required
any

URL provided by Sportingtech

customorigin
required
any

Base URL of the client or calling application.

Responses

/api-v2/left-menu/{device}/{language}/{trader}

origin
string

referer
string

Referrer URL.

required
object
channel
string
languageId
integer <int64>

/api/generic/getContentByCode

Get news for the given domain, language, device, and trader.

Get news for the given domain, language, device, and trader.

path Parameters
language_id
required
integer <int64>
domain
required
string
trader_id
required
integer <int64>
device
required
string
header Parameters
origin
string

Referrer URL.

referer
string

Referrer URL.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
languageId
integer <int64>
traderId
integer <int64>
device
string

Responses

/api/generic/getNews/{domain}/{language_id}/{device}/{trader_id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "languageId": 0,
  • "traderId": 0,
  • "device": "string"
}

Get used web module codes by trader, language, and device

path Parameters
domain
required
string
device
required
string
language
required
integer
deviceAsUrlParam
required
string
Enum: "d" "m"

Device type: 'd' for desktop or 'm' for mobile.

languageAsUrlParam
required
string

Language id (1, 2, ...).

traderAsUrlParam
required
string

Trader identifier.

header Parameters
Referer
required
string

Full URL

Host
required
string

Host Name
